If YES extract: amount (number), reference, date, sender name. Respond JSON ONLY: {\"is_zelle\": true, \"amount\": 45, \"reference\": \"ABC123\", \"date\": \"2026-04-17\", \"sender_name\": \"John\"}. If NOT: {\"is_zelle\": false}" }] }] }) }}
